heading: Transfer of records to records centers
label: 3103 Transfer of records to records centers
text: When the head of a Federal agency determines that such action may affect substantial economies or increased operating efficiency, the head of such agency shall provide for the transfer of records to a records center maintained and operated by the Archivist, or, when approved by the Archivist, to a center maintained and operated by the head of the Federal agency.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3103, , , , contained provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to repeal by .Pub. L. 90–62082 Stat. 1298Pub. L. 94–575, § 3(a)(3)Oct. 22, 1968
